filename: Administratives - Where to Incorporate and Visas.docx
summary: This document records an internal strategic discussion regarding the optimal location for company incorporation and founder visa processing. It weighs the trade-offs between the UK, Spain, and US markets against funding requirements and administrative speed, specifically noting risks to founder employment status. The notes conclude with a recommendation to prioritize the UK market despite visa hurdles to maintain operational momentum.
